list.vod_content: Now an established part of newly promoted DI Tanika Malikâ€™s crime solving team, retired archaeologist Judith Potts, dog walker Suzie Harris and vicarâ€™s wife Becks Starling are back and bringing their unconventional methods to a string of high-profile murders. From the sudden death of the nicest man in Marlow, the townâ€™s beloved Mayor, to a celebrity chef found dead at the launch of his cookbook with half the town in attendance, the team will be working under the watchful eye of the Marlow community. Theyâ€™ll also be called to action at a university reunion in an eerie manor house where in a surprising twist, Becks finds herself amongst the suspects. Could this case threaten our amateur sleuthsâ€™ roles as civilian advisors?
